key.query: Highland Park Cask Strength No. 5 official

emittedEvidence.query: Highland Park Cask Strength No. 5 official
emittedEvidence.summary:
Yes — the **official producer page** for **Highland Park Cask Strength Release No. 5** is Highland Park’s own site. It confirms this is **Release No. 5**, bottled at **64.7% ABV**, and describes the cask recipe as including **first-fill sherry-seasoned European oak casks**, **Pedro Ximénez sherry casks**, plus **refill casks, bourbon casks, and first-fill sherry-seasoned American oak casks**. ([highlandparkwhisky.com](https://www.highlandparkwhisky.com/en/cask-strength-release-no-5?utm_source=openai))

Independent non-retailer sources line up with that. **Whiskybase** identifies it as a **High
